cards.back: The process of dividing data into separate layers, allowing for easier management and troubleshooting
A set of protocols used for communication over the internet, consisting of TCP (Transmission Control Protocol), IP (Internet Protocol), and others
A conceptual framework for understanding network communication, consisting of 7 layers: Physical, Data Link, Network, Transport, Session, Presentation, and Application
The medium through which data is transmitted between devices, such as wire, fiber optic cable, and wireless
Transmission media that has a physical pathway for data to follow, such as twisted pair cable and coaxial cable
